metadata.title: Fibidy — Open your store. Sell today.
metadata.description: The fastest way for Indonesian creators and small businesses to launch a digital storefront. Build your catalog, share your link, customers order via WhatsApp. Free forever to start.

announcement.messageDesktop: 🚀 Open your store free in 5 minutes — sign up in seconds.
announcement.messageMobile: 🚀 Open your store free in 5 minutes.

hero.eyebrow: Try it first, sign up later
hero.headline: Open your store. Sell today.
hero.subheadline: Build your catalog, share your link, and take orders on WhatsApp.
hero.trustLine: Free forever to start · 5 minutes to launch · WhatsApp-first ordering

commission.title: Keep more of what you earn
commission.description: Every sale matters. Fibidy is built so a bigger share of your revenue stays where it belongs — with you.

expensiveSlow.title: Launch in minutes, not months
expensiveSlow.description: No long quotes, no waiting weeks for a developer. Set up your store today and start selling tonight.

notLocal.title: Designed with Indonesia in mind
notLocal.description: Pricing in Rupiah, WhatsApp ordering, and a flow that fits how Indonesian buyers and sellers actually shop.

features.headline: Everything you need to start selling.
features.subheadline: Four building blocks that turn an idea into your first sale today — clear, focused, and ready to use.

channels.title: Reach every channel from one link

scale.headline: Sellers are already open for business.
scale.subheadline: From coffee roasters to handmade studios — these are live Fibidy storefronts, each on its own address, each secured by default. Yours can be next.

infiniteDomains.title: One link per store
infiniteDomains.description: Every seller gets a clean your-name.fibidy.com — or brings their own .com or .id. Run as many storefronts as you grow into.

instantSsl.title: Secure from minute one
instantSsl.description: Every store above is HTTPS by default — free SSL the second it goes live, custom domains included. Nothing to set up.

zeroMaintenance.title: Nothing to maintain
zeroMaintenance.description: No servers, no certificates to renew, no hosting bills. Sellers focus on selling; we keep the lights on.

howItWorks.headline: From idea to first sale, in 5 minutes.
howItWorks.subheadline: Three simple steps. No coding, no complicated setup.

build.title: Pick a template, make it yours
build.description: Choose from designer-curated storefront templates. Swap the colors, edit the copy — every change shows up live. Simple, visual, and familiar.

share.title: Drop your link anywhere
share.description: your-name.fibidy.com works in WhatsApp, Instagram bios, TikTok captions, email signatures. Customers tap once and they're already shopping.

sell.title: Take orders right in WhatsApp
sell.description: Customer taps Order, you reply with payment details, ship it out. You stay in control of the conversation and the payment — start to finish.

pricing.headline: Three plans. One ladder. Honest pricing.
pricing.subheadline: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. The same plans you see post-signup — clear, predictable, and easy to compare.
pricing.roadmapNote: Digital downloads, KYC payouts, and the per-tier platform fees are still being polished. Marked as Coming Soon below — we'll switch them on for everyone at the same time when those features ship.

storeBuilder.eyebrow: Try it first, sign up later
storeBuilder.headline: Grab your link before someone else does.
storeBuilder.subheadline: Claim your free your-name.fibidy.com address now. It's yours the moment you sign up — about a minute, no card needed.

states.available: Available! Your store is ready to launch.
states.taken: Already taken. Try one of these:
states.invalid: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
states.reserved: This name is reserved by the system.

storeBuilder.trustLine: Sign up in 2 minutes · Quick and easy

isFree.a: Yes — the Free plan is free forever, with no card required and no trial expiry. You can run a real storefront on it indefinitely. Paid plans (Starter and Business) unlock higher limits and lower platform fees when you're ready to scale.

paymentNoStripe.a: Customers tap 'Order via WhatsApp' on your storefront and you take it from there. Bank transfer, OVO, GoPay, COD — whichever method works best for you and your customer. You stay in full control of the transaction. Direct payouts via Stripe IDR are coming as part of the Business plan roadmap.

customDomain.q: Can I use my own domain?
customDomain.a: Yes — Fibidy supports custom domains. Point your-shop.com at us and we'll handle the rest. Or stay on your-name.fibidy.com — entirely your call.

paidPlans.a: Starter (Rp 35.000/month) gives you 20 products, 3 photos each, and a 5% platform fee. Business (Rp 149.000/month) bumps that to 50 products, 5 photos each, and a 2% fee. Direct Stripe IDR payouts and digital product downloads are on the way.

fibidyVsLinktree.a: Fibidy is a full storefront, not just a link page. Product photos, prices, categories, search, and a custom domain are all built in. Customers can order from you directly via WhatsApp without needing to bounce to another site, which keeps the buying experience smooth from start to finish.

whatToSell.q: What can I sell on Fibidy?
whatToSell.a: Physical goods (fashion, food, crafts) and services (coaching, consultations, salon, studio time) — anything customers can buy from you via WhatsApp today. Digital products (templates, ebooks, courses) are coming with paid plans.

dataExport.q: Can I export my products if I leave?
dataExport.a: Yes. Your data belongs to you. CSV export is on the roadmap. In the meantime, our team is happy to help any seller migrate out manually — just reach out and we'll take care of it.

migrate.q: Can I move from another platform?
migrate.a: Yes. Bring your product photos, descriptions, and prices over and we'll get you set up. Sellers also get hands-on migration help — just send us a message and we'll do the heavy lifting.

finalCta.headline: Start today. Your store is ready in 5 minutes.
finalCta.subheadline: Free forever to start. Sign up in seconds. Order via WhatsApp from day one.
finalCta.trustLine: Already have an account? Sign in from the menu above.

footer.tagline: The fastest way to launch your storefront in Indonesia.

softwareApp.name: Fibidy
softwareApp.description: Open your storefront in 5 minutes. Build your catalog, share your link, and let customers order via WhatsApp. Free forever to start, for Indonesian creators and small businesses.
